compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Reproduction Steps

The `prompt-eval` GitHub Actions workflow runs the offline eval-discipline gate over
every packaged eval spec: it loads each `src/rebar/llm/eval_specs/*.eval.yaml` and calls
`rebar.llm.evals.eval.validate_eval_spec(spec, strict=True)` for any dataset-bearing spec,
asserting no errors.

1. On `origin/main` (HEAD abdf44ef7), run the strict validator over the packaged specs.
2. `plan-review-g7.eval.yaml` (added in ef4d5217d) carries a `dataset` but no `gold_set`.
3. Strict validation returns `['strict: eval spec needs a non-empty gold_set (judge kappa alignment)']`,
   the CI step asserts and exits 1 -> the `prompt-eval` job is red on main.

**Expected:** every packaged dataset-bearing eval spec passes strict validation; `prompt-eval` green.
**Actual:** `plan-review-g7.eval.yaml` fails strict validation for a missing `gold_set`.

## Scope

Only `src/rebar/llm/eval_specs/plan-review-g7.eval.yaml`. Add a non-empty, balanced
`gold_set` of `{input, label}` human-gold entries (label in `finding`/`pass`) for the G7
leaf-parent-containment criterion, matching the convention used by
`plan-review-container.eval.yaml`. No code changes.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `plan-review-g7.eval.yaml` has a non-empty `gold_set`; each entry has an `input` and a `label` (`finding`|`pass`).
- [ ] The gold_set is balanced (at least one `finding` and at least one `pass` gold label), mirroring the G7 fire/pass scenarios.
- [ ] `validate_eval_spec(spec, strict=True)` returns `[]` (no errors) for the spec.
- [ ] The `prompt-eval` offline discipline gate passes over all packaged specs (`make lint`/`make test` remain green).
compiled_state.title: prompt-eval CI red on main: plan-review-g7.eval.yaml missing gold_set
